text.title: Video Prompt Engineering — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes prompt-style adjustments by chosen provider.

conclusion.verdict: overlay=camera vocab (dolly, tracking, orbit, crane) + motion speed; max 500 chars
overlay=prose-style sensory description; minimise technical camera terms; max 1500 chars
overlay=multi-stage temporal (starting with X, transitioning to Y); max 4000 chars
overlay=audio + sound descriptions + 4K resolution flag; max 2000 chars
overlay=cinematic + Chinese-style direction works well; max 2500 chars
